faqs.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faqs.subtitle: Everything you need to know about our credit packages

item-1.question: How long are credits valid?
item-1.answer: Credits purchased from our packages are valid for 1 year from the date of purchase. You can use them anytime during this period for any AI photo editing feature.

item-2.question: How do I purchase credits?
item-2.answer: Simply choose a credit package that suits your needs and click 'Buy Now'. You'll be redirected to a secure checkout page where you can complete your purchase using credit card or other supported payment methods.

item-3.question: What's the difference between the packages?
item-3.answer: Starter (200 credits) is perfect for beginners. Popular (1000 credits) offers the best value with priority support. Pro (3000 credits) provides the best bulk discount for professionals who need more credits.

item-4.question: Can I use credits for all AI features?
item-4.answer: Yes! All purchased credits can be used for any AI photo editing feature on our platform, including background removal, image enhancement, upscaling, and all other AI models.

item-5.question: What happens if my credits expire?
item-5.answer: Credits expire 1 year after purchase. We recommend using them before expiration. You can check your credit balance and expiration date in your account dashboard.

item-6.question: Can I transfer credits to another account?
item-6.answer: No, credits are non-transferable and tied to the account that purchased them. This helps us maintain security and prevent fraud.

item-7.question: Do you offer refunds?
item-7.answer: We offer refunds within 30 days of purchase if you haven't used more than 10% of your credits. Please contact our support team for assistance with refund requests.

item-8.question: What payment methods do you accept?
item-8.answer: We accept all major credit cards, debit cards, and PayPal. All payments are processed securely through Stripe, ensuring your payment information is protected.

AboutPage.title: About
AboutPage.description: BuildWay is your ultimate AI tools directory. Discover, compare, and choose the best AI tools for your projects.
AboutPage.introduction: BuildWay is a curated directory of the best AI tools available. Whether you're a developer, designer, marketer, or entrepreneur, we help you discover and compare AI tools to find the perfect solution for your needs. From productivity tools to creative AI, we make finding the right AI tool simple and efficient.

faqs.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faqs.subtitle: Common questions about the AI tools directory

item-1.question: How many AI tools are listed on this website?
item-1.answer: We continuously curate and update high-quality AI tools covering various fields including image generation, video generation, text writing, audio music, code development, and more. Our collection is constantly growing as we add new tools.

item-2.question: How can I submit my AI tool?
item-2.answer: Click the 'Submit Tool' button on the homepage and fill in the basic information about your tool (name, website, description, category, etc.). We will review your submission within 1-3 business days, and once approved, it will be displayed on the website.

item-3.question: How are tools categorized?
item-3.answer: We categorize tools by function into multiple categories: image generation, video generation, text writing, audio music, code development, design creativity, productivity, marketing SEO, data analysis, chat assistants, and more. Each tool may belong to multiple categories.

item-4.question: Are all tools free?
item-4.answer: No. The tools we list include completely free tools, tools with free trials, and paid-only tools. Each tool's detail page will indicate pricing information, so you can choose the right tool based on your needs.

item-5.question: How do I search for a specific tool?
item-5.answer: Use the search box at the top of the homepage and enter keywords to search. The search will match tool names, descriptions, and tags to help you quickly find the tools you need.

item-6.question: What are featured tools?
item-6.answer: Featured tools are high-quality tools carefully selected by our editorial team based on quality, popularity, user reviews, and feature completeness. These tools excel in their respective fields.

item-7.question: How often is the directory updated?
item-7.answer: We regularly update our directory with new AI tools and remove outdated or discontinued ones. Our team reviews and adds new tools on a weekly basis to ensure you have access to the latest and most relevant AI solutions.

item-8.question: Can I request a specific tool to be added?
item-8.answer: Yes! If you know of a great AI tool that isn't listed, you can submit it through our 'Submit Tool' feature. We review all submissions and add tools that meet our quality standards and provide value to our community.

metadata.title: Vidlyo - AI Video & Image Generator | One-Stop Creation Platform
metadata.description: Your one-stop AI video & image creation platform. Generate stunning images, create videos from text or images with AI. Text to Video, Image to Video, AI Animation Generator and more.

hero.title: Create Stunning
hero.subtitle: Your one-stop AI creation platform.
hero.noPlasticSkin: Text to Video. Image to Video.
hero.description: Transform your ideas into stunning videos and images with AI. Generate from text prompts, animate photos, create AI art — all in one powerful platform.

howItWorks.title: Create AI Videos & Images in 3 Simple Steps
howItWorks.subtitle: Transform your ideas into stunning visuals. Enter a prompt, choose your style, and let AI do the magic. No technical skills needed.

upload.title: Enter Your Creative Prompt
upload.description: Describe what you want to create — a cinematic video scene, stunning artwork, or animated character. Upload reference images for even better results.

choose.title: Choose AI Model & Style
choose.description: Select from our powerful AI models. Pick aspect ratio, duration, and style. Our AI video generator and image generator handle the rest.

download.title: Download Your AI Creation
download.description: Your AI-generated video or image is ready in seconds. Preview, refine if needed, then download in high quality. Professional results every time.

features.title: Powerful AI Image Creation Features
features.subtitle: Everything you need to create stunning images with AI. From text-to-image to style transfer, professional quality to lightning-fast generation. Video features coming soon.

textToVideo.subtitle: AI Video Generator
textToVideo.title: Text to Video AI
textToVideo.description: Turn your text prompts into stunning, captivating videos. Describe any scene — cinematic shots, product demos, or creative animations — and watch AI bring your vision to life with realistic motion and audio. Coming soon.

imageToVideo.subtitle: Image to Video AI
imageToVideo.title: Animate Your Images with AI
imageToVideo.description: Transform still images into dynamic, realistic videos. Upload a photo and let AI add natural motion, expressions, and life. Perfect for creating engaging content from existing photos. Coming soon.

referenceToVideo.subtitle: Reference to Video
referenceToVideo.title: Keep Characters Consistent Across Videos
referenceToVideo.description: Provide reference images of your character, object, or scene, and keep them consistent across all frames in your videos. Perfect for storytelling, brand content, and series creation. Coming soon.

textToImage.subtitle: AI Image Generator
textToImage.title: Text to Stunning Images
textToImage.description: Transform your ideas into stunning visuals with AI. Simply describe what you want — futuristic cityscapes, serene landscapes, or anything you can imagine. Our advanced AI models generate high-quality images in seconds.

cartoonStyle.subtitle: Cartoon Style Converter
cartoonStyle.title: Transform Photo into Cartoon-Style
cartoonStyle.description: In just one click, transform your photos into favored cartoon styles, such as Disney, Pixar, Simpsons, and Cyberpunk for free! Step into the spotlight on social media.

ghibliStyle.subtitle: Ghibli Style Converter
ghibliStyle.title: Convert Photo to Ghibli-Style
ghibliStyle.description: Quickly turn your photos into Ghibli-style artwork with lush, hand-drawn animation and vibrant color palettes. Capture every detail in your images and infuse them with whimsical and magical elements.

handMadePaintings.subtitle: Hand-Made Style Converter
handMadePaintings.title: Change Photos to Hand-Made Paintings
handMadePaintings.description: Effortlessly add a hand-made painting filter to your images. Swiftly convert your digital photos into high-quality and watermark-free oil paintings, illustrations, or watercolor artwork.

aiAnimation.subtitle: AI Animation Generator
aiAnimation.title: Create Anime & Cartoon Videos
aiAnimation.description: Generate captivating anime and cartoon videos in various styles. Choose from famous animator styles including Hayao Miyazaki, Makoto Shinkai, and more. Transform your ideas into animated masterpieces. Coming soon.

aiOutfitChange.subtitle: AI Outfit Changer
aiOutfitChange.title: AI Smart Outfit Change
aiOutfitChange.description: Upload your photo and choose different clothing styles. AI helps you achieve perfect outfit changes while maintaining your facial features, expressions, and pose. Perfect for fashion photography, social media content, and creative design.

useCases.title: What Can You Create with Vidlyo?
useCases.description: Powerful AI tools for every creative scenario. From marketing videos to social content, one-stop solutions for all your needs.

marketing.title: Marketing Videos
marketing.subtitle: Product demos & promotional content
marketing.description: Create stunning product videos, promotional content, and ad creatives with AI. Perfect for e-commerce, social media ads, and brand campaigns.

social.title: Social Media Content
social.subtitle: Viral shorts & engaging posts
social.description: Generate eye-catching videos and images for TikTok, Instagram, YouTube Shorts. Create viral content that stands out in crowded feeds.

avatar.title: AI Avatar Videos
avatar.subtitle: Photo to video avatar
avatar.description: Transform a single photo into a fully animated AI avatar video up to 2 minutes long. Complete with realistic movement, lip sync, and expressive emotions.

animation.title: AI Animation
animation.subtitle: Anime & cartoon style videos
animation.description: Generate captivating anime and cartoon videos in various styles. From Ghibli to Pixar, create animated content without animation skills.

musicVideo.title: AI Music Videos
musicVideo.subtitle: Turn songs into visual stories
musicVideo.description: Turn your songs into captivating music videos in just minutes with AI. Create stunning visuals that match your music's mood and rhythm.

storytelling.title: Visual Storytelling
storytelling.subtitle: Consistent characters & scenes
storytelling.description: Create multi-scene videos with consistent characters and settings. Perfect for short films, educational content, and narrative projects.

productShots.title: Product Photography
productShots.subtitle: Professional product images
productShots.description: Generate stunning product images with perfect lighting and backgrounds. Ideal for e-commerce listings, catalogs, and marketing materials.

artCreation.title: AI Art Generation
artCreation.subtitle: Digital art & illustrations
artCreation.description: Create unique digital artwork, illustrations, and concept art. From realistic to abstract, explore endless creative possibilities.

videoEnhance.title: Video Enhancement
videoEnhance.subtitle: Upscale & improve quality
videoEnhance.description: Enhance video quality with AI. Upscale resolution, improve clarity, and transform ordinary footage into professional-grade content.

styleTransfer.title: Style Transfer
styleTransfer.subtitle: Transform video aesthetics
styleTransfer.description: Apply artistic styles to your videos. Transform footage into anime, oil painting, cyberpunk, and 30+ creative styles.

imageEdit.title: AI Image Editing
imageEdit.subtitle: Edit with text prompts
imageEdit.description: Edit images using natural language. Remove backgrounds, change elements, enhance quality — all with simple text descriptions.

shorts.title: AI Shorts Generator
shorts.subtitle: One-click viral videos
shorts.description: Create breathtaking multi-scene short videos with just one click. Perfect for TikTok, Reels, and YouTube Shorts content.

sarah.name: Sarah Mitchell
sarah.content: Vidlyo's AI video generator is incredible! I create stunning videos from text prompts in minutes. The text-to-video quality rivals professional production.

james.name: James Chen
james.content: This AI video generator saves us hours of production time. Image to video AI is perfect for product demos. Best AI creation platform for marketing teams.

emily.name: Emily Rodriguez
emily.content: Finally an all-in-one AI creation platform! AI image generator plus video tools in one place. My engagement has skyrocketed since using Vidlyo.

midCta.title: Your One-Stop
midCta.description: Create stunning AI videos and images with text prompts. Text to Video, Image to Video, AI Animation, AI Image Generator — all in one powerful platform.

trustSecurity.title: Create with AI
trustSecurity.description: Your creations are personal. Vidlyo keeps your content encrypted and private. Create AI videos and images with confidence — no data sharing.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Everything you need to know about BuildWay

noSignup.question: What is BuildWay?
noSignup.answer: BuildWay is a curated directory of the best AI tools available. We help you discover, compare, and choose the right AI tools for your projects, whether you're a developer, designer, marketer, or entrepreneur.

freeToUse.question: Is BuildWay free to use?
freeToUse.answer: Yes! BuildWay is completely free to use. You can browse, search, and discover AI tools without any registration or payment required.

upscale.question: How do you select tools?
upscale.answer: We carefully curate each tool based on quality, user reviews, features, and reliability. Our team tests and evaluates tools to ensure we only recommend the best solutions.

enhance.question: Can I submit my AI tool?
enhance.answer: Absolutely! We welcome tool submissions from developers and companies. Click the 'Submit Tool' button to share your AI tool with our community.

pixelated.question: How often is the directory updated?
pixelated.answer: We update our directory regularly, adding new tools weekly and updating existing listings to ensure information stays current and accurate.

secured.question: Do you offer tool comparisons?
secured.answer: Yes! Each tool listing includes detailed information, ratings, and features to help you compare different options and make informed decisions.

mobileSupport.question: Can I use BuildWay on mobile?
mobileSupport.answer: Yes! BuildWay is fully responsive and works perfectly on all devices — desktop, tablet, and mobile. Browse and discover AI tools on the go.

regenerate.question: How are tools categorized?
regenerate.answer: Tools are organized by categories like productivity, design, development, marketing, and more. Use our search and filter features to find exactly what you need.

commercial.question: Do you have affiliate relationships?
commercial.answer: Some tool listings may include affiliate links, which help us maintain the directory. We always prioritize honest reviews and only recommend tools we believe in.

what.subtitle: Introduction
what.title: What is Vidlyo?
what.description: Vidlyo is your one-stop AI video & image creation platform. Generate stunning videos from text prompts, animate photos with AI, create professional images — all in one powerful platform. Text to Video, Image to Video, AI Animation, and more.

why.subtitle: Why Choose Us
why.title: Why Choose Vidlyo AI Creation Platform?
why.description: Vidlyo combines the best AI video generator and AI image generator in one platform. Create professional content in seconds with simple text prompts. No technical skills needed — just describe what you want and let AI do the magic.

struggling.subtitle: Get Started
struggling.title: Ready to Create Amazing AI Content?
struggling.description: Traditional video and image creation is slow and expensive. Vidlyo changes that. Generate AI videos and images with simple text prompts. From marketing content to social media posts — create professional visuals in minutes, not hours.

highlights.title: Why Creators Choose Vidlyo
highlights.subtitle: All-in-one AI creation platform with powerful features. AI video generator, AI image generator, animation tools — everything you need in one place.

easy.title: Simple Text Prompts
easy.description: No complex software — just describe what you want. Our AI understands natural language and creates stunning videos and images from your descriptions.

models.title: Powerful AI Models
models.description: Access cutting-edge AI models for video and image generation. From fast iterations to high-quality professional output — choose the right model for your needs.

free.title: All-in-One Platform
free.description: Text to Video, Image to Video, AI Animation, AI Image Generator — all creation tools in one platform. No need to switch between multiple apps.

finalCta.title: Start Creating
finalCta.description: Join millions of creators using Vidlyo. Generate stunning AI videos and images with simple text prompts. Your one-stop AI creation platform.

submit.title: Submit Your AI Tool
submit.description: Share your AI tool with our community. We review all submissions carefully.

free.title: FREE
free.feature1: Get 3 dofollow links to boost your SEO
free.feature4: Publish your product the day you want
free.limit1: Backlink to our site is required
free.backlinkRequired: Free listing requires a backlink to our site.

pro.title: PRO
pro.feature1: Get >= 3 dofollow links to boost your SEO
pro.feature4: Featured placement at the top of listings
pro.feature5: Share through social media and newsletters
pro.comingSoonNote: Secure payment via Creem. You will be redirected to checkout after submitting.

inclusionTips.title: Submission Guidelines
items: Only AI-related tools or websites are accepted. Non-AI tools will be rejected
The tool website must be accessible. Broken or inaccessible links will be rejected
We do not accept tools or websites related to adult content, gambling, or other grey-area industries
Submissions with functionality identical to already-listed tools may be rejected
Free plan submissions require a backlink to our site on your website

backlinkNotice.title: Backlink Detection Notice
backlinkNotice.message: We detected that your website does not contain a backlink to us. Please add a backlink on your website, then resubmit for review.

examples.title: Example Tools
examples.description: Here are some tools we've already featured, which you can use as a reference:

form.descriptionOptional: Optional: Tell us more about this tool
form.emailHint: We'll contact you if we have questions

loginRequired.title: Login Required

success.title: Submission Successful!

success.reviewNote: We will review your submission within 1-2 weeks.

errors.checkForm: Please check the form for errors.

backlinkVerification.title: Backlink Verification Required
backlinkVerification.description: Free submission requires a backlink to our site. Please add a link on your website first.
backlinkVerification.notFound: No backlink found. Please add a link to our site and try again.
backlinkVerification.error: Failed to verify backlink. Please try again.
backlinkVerification.dialogAutoVerifyFailed: We detected that your website does not contain a backlink to us. Please add a backlink on your website, then click Verify.

backlinkVerification.step2: Come back here and click "Verify Backlink".
